title: Kenyan Plum Muffins
description: Warm and flavorful muffins infused with the sweetness of plums and the spices of Kenya.
instructions: Line a 12-cup muffin tin with paper liners.
In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, and cinnamon.
In a large bowl, use an electric mixer to beat together sugar and eggs.
Add milk, oil, and vanilla extract; mix until well combined.
Add the flour mixture to the wet ingredients; mix until just combined.
Divide the batter evenly among the muffin cups.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
Allow muffins to cool in the tin for 5 minutes, then transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
